message:
bd-4jzg: Add Status spinner moments for polish

Add brief spinner animations to make the demo feel more alive:
- Hero scene: "Validating environment…" at startup
- Dashboard scene: "Building deployment plan…" before dashboard
- Export scene: "Generating export bundle…" before export summary

The Status helper handles interactive/non-interactive fallback:
- Interactive mode: animated spinner via Live
- Non-interactive: prints message once (no animation)

Quick mode uses shorter durations (200ms vs 500-800ms).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
